role: SS&C Technologies — Associate Learning & Development Specialist

checks.name: 1. No fabrication / metrics trace to content_library
checks.check: All metrics + claims trace to canonical; banned $340K/17-launches/Jira/Articulate absent; no call-center/healthcare-call-center fabrication
checks.evidence: Every number is canonical: $362K leave costs, 300+ leave cases, 25+ stakeholders, 70+ staff, 75% onboarding cut, 600+ webinar participants, 78% program enrollment rate, 2,000+ employee experiences, 23/12 leaders, 3 programs, 566%, 1,000+ competitors — all present in content_library.md. No '$340K', no '17 launches', no Jira/Articulate/Storyline/eLeap/EasyLlama. No call-center or healthcare-call-center claim appears anywhere in resume or cover; the only 'healthcare' token is the real employer name 'NextGen Healthcare'.

checks.name: 2. No relabeling — ODN full name + OD-consulting framing
checks.check: ODN named in full; described as OD diagnostic consulting, not community/ERG; two projects kept separate
checks.evidence: 'Organization Development Network (ODN) Oregon', title 'Consultant, Organization & Talent Development'. P1 leave-cost diagnosis (bullets 1-2: 'audit 300+ leave cases', '$362K in leave costs') and P2 NGO leadership ('focus groups and 1:1 interviews with an NGO leadership team to surface decision-making and accountability gaps') stay in separate bullets — never blended. No community-building / ERG relabel.

checks.name: 3. No JD copy-paste / clichés
checks.check: Summary/bullets/cover adapt Jamie's real words, not JD parroting or clichés
checks.evidence: InGenius bullets reworded to JD vocab ('training needs assessments', 'skill gaps', 'guides, workflows, and learning materials', 'participant feedback analysis') but each is a truthful re-label of a real canonical Set-A bullet, not lifted JD duty text. Cover belief-opener 'Learning and development isn't just about rolling out courses' is Jamie's signature pattern, not JD phrasing. No clichés like 'drove strategic transformation'.
checks.canonical_source: content_library.md L155-160 (L&D emphasis set); cover_letter_canonical.md Para 1

checks.name: 4. Cover canonical skeleton adherence
checks.check: Dear Hiring Team salutation, no address block, belief-opener, Vestas->NextGen->InGenius anchors, org-psych close, no role-upgrade, signature
checks.evidence: 'Dear SS&C Technologies Hiring Team,'; no street-address block; Para-1 belief sentence + 'continuous cycle of collecting insights, analyzing data, and refining solutions'; OD/L&D tagline line-2 'Dedicated to Driving Individual and Organizational Development'; four experience paragraphs in canonical order Vestas -> NextGen -> InGenius; org-psych close present with 'analytical organizer with a growth mindset' and 'MS in Applied Organizational Psychology (USC)'; Vestas workshop kept as 'Initiated a DEI pilot' (no build/facilitate/led upgrade); signed 'Sincerely, Jamie (Yi-Chieh) Cheng'.

checks.name: 5. Substance floor + voice + honest gap
checks.check: Every canonical metric survives tailoring; cover voice human not AI; no-call-center gap not papered over
checks.evidence: Mechanical verify_substance_floor PASS (no metric/clause dropped vs canonical). InGenius 4 bullets, NextGen/Vestas/Kronos 4 each, ODN 3 — none deleted to fit. Cover reads in Jamie's warm, concrete voice. The package makes NO claim of call-center or healthcare-call-center experience (a genuine gap) — it frames only transferable L&D/training/program work, which is the honest move rather than overclaiming.

checks.name: 6. PDF last-mile
checks.check: resume.pdf 1 page, non-empty, all metrics, right company/role, newer than source
checks.evidence: Mechanical verify_pdf_matches_source PASS. Visual read of resume.pdf: exactly 1 page, all five experiences + every metric render correctly, header 'Portland, OR (Open to Remote or Relocation)'. cover_letter.pdf renders the SS&C salutation, role line, bolded keywords, and cursive signature. Tailored-resume gate PASS (company 'SS&C Technologies' + role keywords present in PDF text).

checks.name: 7. LMS honesty
checks.check: Only genuine Canvas/Moodle LMS exposure; no invented authoring tools
checks.evidence: Skills line reads 'LMS (Canvas, Moodle)' moved to front because the JD names LMS administration. No Articulate, Storyline, eLeap, EasyLlama, or any SS&C-specific authoring/LMS tool was added. Canvas/Moodle are Jamie's canonical LMS vocabulary.

checks.name: 8. Fit honesty
checks.check: Genuine entry-level L&D fit, transferable framing, no overclaim
checks.evidence: JD is entry-level / 1-2 YOE; Jamie (~3yr) is comfortably at-level, not a stretch. Resume/cover frame real L&D delivery (needs assessments, learning-material design, training facilitation, vendor mgmt, feedback analysis) that maps to the JD's responsibilities without inflating seniority or inventing the JD's industry context.
checks.canonical_source: JD.txt REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS (1-2 yr); job.json fit=GO at-level

advisories: Summary closing verb-phrase customized to 'improve people development' — a valid honest L&D fit per JAMIE_FEEDBACK_RULES §1; tail 'through human-centered, evidence-based approaches' preserved. OK.

Cover Para-1 closing clause 'how people learn and develop' and skill phrases ('training needs assessment', 'learning-material and program design', 'data-driven program measurement') are JD-aligned re-labels of real work — truthful, not invented. OK.
Sponsorship required = Yes (must be answered truthfully on the Workday form). JD has no explicit no-sponsorship hard-stop, so not a block; just ensure the form answer stays honest at submit time.
